rationale.edition: The diff spans both OSS and enterprise paths: the bulk of the change is in OSS locations (src/common/utils/, src/handler/http/, web/src/components/settings/, web/src/services/), while web/src/enterprise/components/billings/UsageReportBanner.vue sits in the enterprise layer. The license feature itself is enterprise-gated (keyword 'license' present in paths and symbols), but the implementation layers span both trees — classified as 'both'.
rationale.skip: Not skipped. The trigger comment is empty (no explicit opt-out like 'tests-added' or a skip request). The change is user-facing: it adds a new 'Refresh License Limits' button in the License settings UI and alters the Usage Report Banner display timeout. These are exercisable UI flows that warrant E2E testing.
rationale.e2e: E2E is warranted. The diff adds a new interactive button ('Refresh License Limits') to the License settings page (web/src/components/settings/License.vue) with success/error notification states, and modifies the Usage Report Banner refresh interval. Both are user-facing UI behaviors that need verification across different license states and error scenarios.
rationale.area: The License settings page is a system-level administration feature. The GeneralTests group already hosts similar ENT-gated settings specs (cipherKeys.spec.js, logoManagement.spec.js, ingestion-config.spec.js) and organization-level tests, making it the closest fit for a license management spec.
rationale.group: The GeneralTests matrix shard in playwright.yml runs administrative/configuration specs including ENT-gated features like cipher keys and logo management. The license refresh spec fits naturally alongside these — same kind of settings-page, admin-only UI interaction, same ENT feature tier.
rationale.existing_tests: No Playwright E2E specs (tests/ui-testing/playwright-tests/**/*.spec.js) are added or modified in this diff. The diff only touches backend Rust code, Vue components, locale JSON files, and a TypeScript service — none of which are E2E test specs.
